ownership: builder owns src/ edits; orchestrator owns .claude/ + validation; parallel work only on distinct files

L16: genuine error-level anti-patterns (sealed interface->class x12, public mutable var->val x42, secondary ctor x4, primitive-array-in-data-class x7, nullable-bag x2, lateinit x1, mutable-collection x1) = builder. L17: 705 loose camelCase top-level fns -> internal objects across 81 files (PARALLEL workflow). L18: warn sweep (else-in-sealed-when x37, keyed-json-cast x124, multiple-boolean-params x19, others). current_layer=16.
hard_rules: no camelCase top-level fns (only PascalCase factories); logic on types/in units; Flow over suspend; sealed CLASS not interface; no public/top-level/companion mutable var; no secondary ctor/lateinit/!!; sealed errors; typed over Map<String,JsonElement>/Any?
